creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #2)
There is a broken dep in /usr/ports/www/rubygem-unicorn-worker-killer which causes other dependencies not to work.
It includes www/rubygem-unicorn version 5.4.0 which breaks another dependency gitlab requires, that is the reason why I created this PR.
